# EggShell Documentation

> EggShell is a full-stack F# application framework: a Microsoft Orleans backend, a Fable + react-native-web frontend, a shared F# type system marshalled over JSON, a state-machine ("lifecycle") programming model, and deterministic simulation testing. This site is the framework documentation and the live component gallery.

Orientation for machine readers:
- Docs are Markdown served at `/docs/<path>`. The links below are paths relative to this docs root; fetch `/docs/<path>` to read a page.
- Cross-links inside pages are root-relative (`./section/page.md`), resolved against the docs root, not the current file's directory.
- Current toolchain: Fable 5.4.0, .NET 10 SDK (10.0.301), Fable.React 10.0.0-alpha.1. The frontend primitive layer has been migrated off `@chaldal/reactxp` to react-native-web (stabilizing). Orleans is 3.7.2 and storage is SQL Server (both pending upgrade).
- Start at [Architecture Overview](architecture/index.md) for the system model and [Modernization & Current Status](modernization/index.md) for where the project stands.
- For the framework's strengths, tradeoffs, performance characteristics, and fit (when to use it and when not), see [Evaluating EggShell](evaluating-eggshell.md).
- **Before changing code or docs, read [Keeping Code and Docs in Sync](maintaining-docs.md)** — the single map of which docs to read/update for any change, and how to keep the docs consistent.

## Architecture (framework reference)
- [Overview](architecture/index.md): big picture, repo-layout conventions, tech baseline.
- [Lifecycles / State Machines](architecture/backend-lifecycles.md): the backend programming model (Subject, LifeAction, LifeEvent, transitions, side effects, Orleans grains).
- [Hosting & Persistence](architecture/backend-hosting-persistence.md): Orleans silo, SQL Server storage abstraction, and the PostgreSQL seams.
- [Shared Types & Codecs](architecture/shared-types-codecs.md): Fleece codecs, codec evolution validation, request/subscription wire path.
- [Testing Framework](architecture/testing-framework.md): the `simulation { }` harness, virtual clock, connector interception, stasis detection.
- [Frontend](architecture/frontend.md): component model, react-native-web interop, routing, subscription data flow, animation.
- [Render DSL & Toolchain](architecture/render-dsl-and-toolchain.md): the retired `.render` DSL, its compiler, and the `eggshell` CLI.
- [Key File Map](architecture/file-map.md): where each concern lives in the source tree.

## Modernization & Current Status
- [Current Status](modernization/index.md): the authoritative status dashboard (toolchain, Goals A-K, Phases 0-6).
- [Goals & Roadmap](modernization/goals-and-roadmap.md): Goals A-K plus security, short-term vs long-term.
- [Phased Plan](modernization/phased-plan.md): Phases 0-6 with per-phase status.
- [RN 0.86 Upgrade: Done and Remaining](modernization/rn86-upgrade-status.md): detailed done-vs-remaining tracker for the ReactXP-retirement + React 19 / RN 0.86 / Fabric upgrade (remaining: gallery native ThirdParty, Reanimated adoption, PerformancePlayground, create-app, ship).
- [ReactXP to react-native-web](modernization/reactxp-to-rnw.md): the frontend migration rationale, fork audit, and RN/RNW ecosystem.
- [Render DSL Retirement](modernization/render-dsl-retirement.md): Goal A status, verbosity/structure, a11y and automation bar.
- [Build Performance](modernization/build-performance.md): frontend build bottlenecks and levers.
- [SQL Server to Postgres](modernization/sql-server-to-postgres.md): plan for the PostgreSQL (PG-only end-state) + Orleans 3.7 to 10.x storage migration (current storage layer, feature-by-feature port table, Durable Jobs evaluation, PG 18 native features, spike-driven execution). Goal G.
- [Backend Interoperability](modernization/backend-interop.md): Goals J and K. Standalone backend (Y-shaped dependency), consumer tiers (Fable UI, .NET NuGet SDK = Goal J, OpenAPI-generated polyglot clients = Goal K), contract-vs-encoding, and easy wins.
- [Scaffolding](modernization/scaffolding.md): why `eggshell create-app` is broken and the fix plan.
- [Security Review](modernization/security-review.md): candidate auth/SQL/crypto findings (leads to verify).

## Runbooks (procedures)
- [Overview & Decision Tree](runbooks/index.md): the "I'm stuck" tree and the two-tier observation model.
- [The Dev Loop](runbooks/dev-loop.md): edit, rebuild, confirm, reload, observe.
- [Android](runbooks/android.md), [iOS](runbooks/ios.md), [Web](runbooks/web.md): per-platform debug loops.
- [Audit Toolkit](runbooks/audit-toolkit.md): the Appium/Playwright `observe` toolkit.
- [Build & Rebuild](runbooks/build-rebuild.md): targeted recompile, restart triggers, killing stale watches.
- [Troubleshooting](runbooks/troubleshooting.md): symptom-to-fix catalog (build/cache, styling, RNW bindings, layout, color, pickers, gestures).
- [Migration Execution](runbooks/migration-execution.md): the executor manual for the .NET 10 + Fable 5 + RNW migration.

## Accessibility (mandatory, default)
- [Overview & Principles](accessibility/index.md): why a11y is a framework concern; the "pit of success" principles.
- [Full Spectrum & WCAG](accessibility/spectrum.md): coverage across every disability dimension plus WCAG cross-index.
- [Recipes & Playbook](accessibility/recipes.md): screen-reader semantics and per-component patterns.
- [Platform Settings](accessibility/platform-settings.md): OS settings to honor reactively.
- [Backlog](accessibility/backlog.md): migration-safe vs deferred items with tags.
- [Scanner Audits](accessibility/scanner-audit.md): on-device WCAG-AA audits with Google's Accessibility Scanner; AppTodo findings.

## Knowledge Base
- [Overview](knowledge-base/index.md): how the KB relates to Architecture and Runbooks.
- [Engineering Log](knowledge-base/engineering-log.md): the dated running log of the modernization effort (append new entries at the top).
- [App Structure](knowledge-base/app-structure.md): app source layering and `.fsproj` build-order conventions.
- [Dependencies](knowledge-base/dependencies.md): npm dependency baseline snapshot.

## F# & Components (frontend developer guide)
- [F# Components](fsharp/component.md): the `[<Component>]` + hooks authoring model.
- [Components](components/index.md): the frontend component catalog landing page.
- [Design Introduction](design/index.md): design-system and visual-design orientation.
- [Styling](fsharp/styling.md): the typed style DSL and avoiding style leaks.
- [Theming](fsharp/themeing.md), [Formatting](fsharp/formatting.md) (canonical F# style reference), [Legacy Interop](fsharp/legacy.md), [Background](fsharp/background.md).
- [Where to Find Examples](fsharp/examples.md): pointers to worked component examples in the codebase.

- [Introduction](tools/index.md), [eggshell CLI](tools/cli.md) (commands + `eggshell.json` schema), [Snippets](tools/snippets.md).

## Unsorted (working notes, not yet slotted into a section)
- [Background and Design Decisions](unsorted/background.md): rationale notes behind EggShell design choices.
- [Component Design](unsorted/component-design.md): working notes on component design.
- [Debugging](unsorted/debugging.md): assorted debugging notes.
- [Directory Structure](unsorted/directory-structure.md): source directory-layout notes.
- [EggShell-Specific F# Good Practices](unsorted/eggshell-specific-fsharp-good-practices.md): F# coding practices particular to EggShell.
- [Icons Infrastructure](unsorted/icons.md): how icons are wired.
- [XmlDocs](unsorted/xmldocs.md): XML documentation notes.

## Optional (legacy reference)
- [Legacy Introduction](legacy/index.md), [Render DSL](renderDsl/index.md) + [style guide](renderDsl/style-guide.md), [Styles DSL](stylesDsl/index.md) + [style guide](stylesDsl/style-guide.md). These describe the retired DSLs; new code uses pure-F# components (see [F# Components](fsharp/component.md)).
